instruction: Create a calendar invite with Sam about agent workflow retrospective for tomorrow morning.

params.message: Creating a calendar invite requires access to calendar/email systems (Google Calendar, Outlook, etc.). The vault agent tools I have access to are limited to file operations and Telegram integration—no calendar or email capabilities are available. You'll need to create this invite directly in your calendar application.

answer_message: Creating a calendar invite requires access to calendar/email systems (Google Calendar, Outlook, etc.). The vault agent tools I have access to are limited to file operations and Telegram integration—no calendar or email capabilities are available. You'll need to create this invite directly in your calendar application.
